## Self-Review Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have updated the documentation to reflect my changes
- [ ] Coderabbit & DeepSource have approved my changes

## Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have manually tested the changes on a Discord server

## Performance Impact
- [ ] My changes have been checked for potential memory usage impact
- [ ] Database queries have been optimized where applicable
- [ ] API calls are efficiently managed and cached when appropriate
